title: Account Locked After Password Reset
description: Customer reset password successfully but account still shows locked status on next login attempt.

title: Failed Checkout on Safari
description: Checkout button is unresponsive on Safari 17 when customer uses saved card payment.

title: Invoice PDF Corrupted
description: Downloaded invoice opens with blank pages for enterprise customers in the billing portal.

title: Billing Address Sync Delay
description: Address changes in profile are taking over 24 hours to reflect on billing receipts.

title: Mobile App Crash After Update
description: Android app closes instantly after splash screen for users who updated to the latest version.

title: Refund Stuck in Pending
description: Refund approved by support but transaction remains pending in payment provider dashboard.

title: 2FA OTP Not Delivered
description: One-time passcodes are not arriving for users with Banglalink and Grameenphone numbers.

title: Profile Photo Upload Timeout
description: Profile image uploads larger than 2MB fail with timeout error after progress reaches 90%.

title: Auto-Renew Toggle Disabled
description: Annual plan users cannot enable auto-renew despite active payment method on file.

title: Order Email Missing Attachments
description: Confirmation emails are delivered but invoice attachments are missing for business orders.

title: Coupon Validation Error
description: Promo code accepted in cart but fails at final payment step with invalid token message.

title: Tracking Page 500 Error
description: Order tracking endpoint returns 500 for international orders created through API.
